raw.title: Emad Mostaque CEO Stability AI: The AI Entrepreneur to Watch.
raw.text:
Emad Mostaque CEO Stability AI: The AI Entrepreneur to Watch. – TurnOnAi
[Skip to content](#primary-content)
[TurnOnAi](https://turnonai.com/)
See Where AI Impacts… !
Search for:

[**](#)
Search for:
# Emad Mostaque CEO Stability AI: The AI Entrepreneur to Watch.
Posted on[August 3, 2023August 7, 2023](https://turnonai.com/why-trending/emad-mostaque-ceo-stability-ai-the-ai-entrepreneur-to-watch/sophia-smith/)by[Sophia Smith](https://turnonai.com/author/sophia-smith/)
[]()[]()[]()[]()[]()[]()[]()[]()[]()[](https://www.addtoany.com/share)
Emad Mostaque is an AI entrepreneur and researcher making waves in Generative AI. He is the founder and CEO of Stability AI, a company that develops and deploys open, generative AI models.
* **Stability AI is a company that develops safe and ethical generative AI models.**
* **Emad Mostaque: AI engineer, advocate, and visionary.**
* **Text-to-image AI can help you create unique and creative images quickly and easily.**
##### Pro
Stability AI’s research communities can develop breakthrough AI models applied to imaging, language, code, audio, video, 3D content, design, biotech, and other scientific research.
##### Con
Stability AI models are still under development, and they can sometimes generate images that are unrealistic or offensive.
##### Verdict
Stability AI has made significant progress, but it is too early to say how it will fare in the long term. As people increasingly turn to augmented reality, it will be interesting to see how Stability AI integrates with this technology.
* **[Emad-Mostaque-Work](#Emad-Mostaque-Work)**
* [**Net Worth**](#Net-Worth)
* [**Biography**](#Biography)
* [**Most-Important-thing-about-Emad-Mostaque**](#Most-Important-thing-about-Emad-Mostaque)
* **[Getty-Images-vs.-Stability-AI-Lawsuit](#Getty-Images-vs.-Stability-AI-Lawsuit)**
* **[Conclusion](#Conclusion)**
## **Emad Mostaque Work**
Mostaque’s work on generative AI has been groundbreaking. His company’s flagship product, Stable Diffusion, is a text-to-image model that can generate realistic and creative images from text descriptions. Notably, people have used Stable Diffusion to create various models, including realistic portraits, landscapes, and even works of art.
Stable Diffusion first generates a low-resolution image based on the text description. Once the user creates the initial design, they can iteratively add more detail and realism until they achieve the desired result. Additionally, Stable Diffusion gets its name from the process known as diffusion modeling.
Basically, Stable Diffusion can be used for various purposes, including creating realistic artwork, generating new product designs, and even developing[new medical treatments.](https://turnonai.com/ai-healthcare/how-ai-is-revolutionizing-medicine-creation/sophia-smith/)The potential impact of generative AI on society is vast, and Mostaque is committed to ensuring that it is used for good.
Mostaque is a strong advocate for the responsible development and use of AI. He believes that AI can be a powerful tool for good, but it is essential to use it safely and ethically. Although, Emad Mostaque has spoken out about the need for clear policies and principles for expanding and using AI. Besides, he has worked to promote the responsible use of AI through his work with the World Economic Forum and other organizations.
## Net Worth
As of August 2023, Emad Mostaque has an estimated net worth of around £803 million ($1.1 billion). Mostaque is the CEO and founder of Stability AI, a company that develops artificial intelligence (AI) technology. Stability AI raised over $100 million in funding and achieved a valuation of over $1 billion. Mostaque derives a large part of his personal wealth from owning Stability AI stock.
## Biography
Mostaque was born in Jordan in 1983, and moved to the UK with his family when he was seven years old. He studied at the University of Oxford. After graduating, Mostaque worked as a hedge fund manager for several years. He also worked as a research scientist at Google AI before founding Stability AI. He chillingly prophesied to his Google coworkers that they would die in 2023 and will be remembered for it. In 2019, he founded Symmitree, a company that aimed to reduce the cost of technology for people living in poverty. Symmitree was acquired by Stability AI in 2020.
Explicitly, Mr. Mostaque is a controversial figure in the AI industry. Although, he has been criticized for his views on the potential dangers of AI, and for handling the Stable Diffusion project. However, many see him as a visionary leader in AI, and his work has helped raise awareness of the potential benefits and risks of this technology.
## Most Important thing about Emad Mostaque
One of the most essential things about Emad Mostaque is his passion for artificial intelligence (AI). Emad Mostaque’s passion for ar

# 10 Brilliant AI Insights from Stability AI’s Founder Emad Mostaque

## I watched an hour long podcast, so you don’t have to

[Vardhanam Daga](https://medium.com/@vardhanam.daga?source=post_page---byline--182905c11a60---------------------------------------)

2 min read

·

Mar 17, 2025

--

Listen

Share

“In one year, AI will generate complex apps like Uber from scratch”. — Emad Mostaque.

Let that sink in. The future of AI is not just coming; it’s already here. And leading the charge is Emad Mostaque, the visionary founder of Stability AI, the company behind the AI image model Stable Diffusion. Here are some of his insights from a podcast that you’ll find linked later.

Insights:

01. AI will revolutionize software development. It will create complex apps from scratch within a year.
02. Generative AI is expanding. It’s tackling video, code, and 3D assets. Content creation will never be the same.
03. AI will augment human creativity. It will empower small teams to rival tech giants.
04. Personalized AI will be our trusted collaborator. It will learn from us and anticipate our needs.
05. Democratization of AI is crucial. Open-source models and datasets will create a future where AI benefits all.
06. AI will eat the world. Industries will be disrupted. Jobs will be transformed. Embrace the change or be left behind.
07. Professionals must adapt to the AI landscape. Mastering AI-assisted tools is key to problem-solving and innovation.
08. AI models are getting smarter and faster. They’ll run on smartphones for real-time, personalized experiences.
09. The future of AI lies in multimodality. Models will seamlessly handle diverse inputs and outputs, revolutionizing human-AI interaction.
10. The AI revolution presents challenges. Equal access, ethics, transparency, and accountability require ongoing dialogue.

In case you are not happy with this summary, you can watch the full podcast here — [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VeaT6ucXuMI](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VeaT6ucXuMI)

[Peter H. Diamandis](https://www.linkedin.com/in/peterdiamandis?trk=public_post_feed-actor-name) Peter H. Diamandis is an Influencer

Data-driven optimist inspiring entrepreneurs through research, investment & community to create an abundant future for humanity \| M.D. \| Futurist \| Speaker \| Podcast Host \| 4x NY Times Best-Selling Author

3mo

- [Report this post](https://www.linkedin.com/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fposts%2Fpeterdiamandis_emad-mostaqueleft-stability-ai-to-build-activity-7354572214039367680-EZUR&trk=public_post_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=POST&_f=guest-reporting)

[Emad Mostaque](https://uk.linkedin.com/in/emad-mostaque-9840ba274?trk=public_post-text) left Stability AI to build a system that saves humanity, not replaces it.
In this episode, we talked about:
\- Why capitalism won’t survive advanced AI
\- What UBAI (Universal Basic AI) could mean for society
\- Why public sector jobs are the safest
\- How we avoid a dystopian AI future
This conversation was one of the most unique and forward-thinking I’ve had about what comes after the AI revolution.
Watch the full episode: search “Moonshots Emad Mostaque UBAI” on YouTube (also link the comments).
